text.title: AI Elicitation Prompt Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step authoring procedure to publish a versioned prompt pattern into the elicitation library.

step.name: pick-phase
step.action: Pick exactly one phase: interview-prep, follow-up, paraphrase-back, persona-probe. Each phase owns its skeleton family.
step.decision-gate: If goal spans 2 phases, split into 2 patterns.

step.name: define-slots
step.action: List slots with name/type/required. Slots are the ONLY user input; everything else is fixed in the skeleton.

step.name: bind-output-schema
step.action: Point output_schema_ref at a JSON Schema. Free-text outputs are forbidden where a parser consumes them.
step.decision-gate: If no schema exists, write one before continuing.

step.name: link-eval
step.action: Author ≥10 golden cases (input slots + expected output) and link via eval_reference.

step.name: declare-budget-and-tag
step.action: Set budget.tokens_in / tokens_out / cost_usd_cap. Bump version_tag (semver). Commit + validate.
